zh.Cranbrook, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可
zh.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: 英國肯特可藍別盧可聖 登斯坦恩斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter Hendley於大約1485年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，他的父親Gervase Hendley27歲，母親Elizabeth Roberts26歲。他於大約1527年與Margery Pigott結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1530年在英國倫敦被列為lent reader at grey's inn。他去世於1550年3月1日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國肯特可藍別盧可聖 登斯坦恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.Cranbrook, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可
zh-hans.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: 英国肯特可藍別盧可聖 登斯坦恩斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter Hendley于大约1485年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，他的父亲Gervase Hendley27岁，母亲Elizabeth Roberts26岁。他于大约1527年与Margery Pigott结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1530年在英国倫敦被列为lent reader at grey's inn。他去世于1550年3月1日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国肯特可藍別盧可聖 登斯坦恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hendley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hanley or else a variant of Henley with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hanley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter Hendley was born about 1485, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, his father, Gervase Hendley, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Roberts, was 26. He married Margery Pigott about 1527. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1530, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as lent reader at grey's inn in London, England. He died on 1 March 1550, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, England.

fr.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter Hendley est né environ 1485, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Gervase Hendley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Roberts, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margery Pigott environ 1527. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1530, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lent reader at grey's inn à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1550, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre.

de.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter Hendley um 1485 in Cranbrook, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gervase Hendley 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Roberts 26. Er hat um 1527 Margery Pigott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1530, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lent reader at grey's inn in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. März 1550 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, England begraben.

it.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, England
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Hendley è nato il circa 1485 nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, il suo padre, Gervase Hendley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Roberts, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margery Pigott circa 1527. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1530, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lent reader at grey's inn nel London, England. Morì il 1 marzo 1550, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, England.

ja.Cranbrook, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントクランブルーク
ja.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: イギリスケントクランブルークスト ダンスタン'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Hendleyが約1485年にイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Gervase Hendleyは27歳，母Elizabeth Robertsは26歳であった。約1527年にMargery Pigottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1530年，46歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はlent reader at grey's innと記録されている。彼は1550年3月1日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスケントクランブルークスト ダンスタン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: 영국 켄트 크랜브룩 스트 던스탠'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter Hendley(이)가 대략 1485년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gervase Hendley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Roberts(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1527년 Margery Pigott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1530년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 lent reader at grey's inn이었다. 그는 1550년 3월 1일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 크랜브룩 스트 던스탠'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter Hendley nasceu aproximadamente 1485, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gervase Hendley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Roberts, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Pigott aproximadamente 1527. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1530, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como lent reader at grey's inn em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1550, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, En: ст дунстан'с чурч, кранбрук, кэнт, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter Hendley родился около 1485 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Gervase Hendley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Roberts, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Pigott около 1527 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1530 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии lent reader at grey's inn в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 1 марта 1550 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ст дунстан'с чурч, кранбрук, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Margery Pigott aproximadamente 1527. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1530, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era lent reader at grey's inn en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1550, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en St Dunstan's Church, Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra.
